results.title: Google Ads Updates Its Campaign Status Interface
results.description: Google is rolling out a new look and feel for the Google Ads campaign status notifications and icons. The new statuses are no longer highlighted fully, instead they are just outlined in various colors. It makes it a bit less extreme to look at, and I am not sure if that is a good or bad change.

results.title: Punjab Govt delivers 437 government services at citizens' doorsteps
results.description: The Punjab government has made 437 services available through its doorstep delivery platform. Citizens can access these services by calling the 1076 helpline, booking appointments through WhatsApp, using the online portal or visiting Sewa Kendras.

results.title: CtrlS Secures ₹7,000 Crore Commitment from CPP Investments to Scale Datacenter Infrastructure in India
results.description: At a Pre-Money Valuation of ₹44,914 Crore (C$6.6 Billion) INR 3,000 Crore (C$441 Million) of the Proceeds to Be Used to Form a Joint Venture HYDERABAD, India, June 17, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- CtrlS Datacenters Ltd. today announced a strategic partnership with Canada Pension Plan Investment...

results.title: HEC Assesses 33,000+ IT Students Across Pakistan in First National Skills Benchmark; Check Results
results.description: Copyright protected content copied from PhoneWorld website. HEC releases NSCT 2026 results after assessing 33,000+ IT students across Pakistan’s first national skills benchmark and rankings online. The post HEC Assesses 33,000+ IT Students Across Pakistan in First National Skills Benchmark; Check Results appeared first on PhoneWorld.

results.title: Poll: Americans wary of data center boom
results.description: WASHINGTON — Just one in three Americans approve of the fast pace of data-center construction that supports artificial intelligence and most would oppose building one in their own community, according to a new Reuters/Ipsos poll.
